arts.ttl: Football fans split after huge Premier League controversy in Tottenham vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Tottenham were left fuming after the ball hit Joelinton's hand just before Anthony Gordon's equaliser, with VAR not intervening, though football fans were split on whether the goal should have stood

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon scores controversial equaliser for Newcastle against Tottenham - as Ange Postecoglou and Spurs coaching staff are left furious
arts.sum: The visitors completed a first-half comeback, courtesy of goals from Anthony Gordon and Alexander Isak, but those of a Spurs persuasion were less than impressed that the first one stood.

arts.ttl: Tottenham close in on first January signing, 21-year-old set to fly in for medical
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are closing in on the capture of the Slavia Prague goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky. According to a report from Sky Sports, the player will cost £12.5 million and the two clubs have already agreed on a deal. The 21-year-old will now fly in for his medical later today. Tottenham needed to sign a quality […] The post Tottenham close in on first January signing, 21-year-old set to fly in for medical appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Brandon Austin, former US youth goalkeeper, makes Premier League debut and has a tough start
arts.sum: Austin, who possesses dual American/English nationality and once played for the U.S. under 18s, conceded in the sixth minute of his senior debut for Spurs when England winger Anthony Gordon drove a low shot into the far corner for Newcastle to make it 1-1. Austin was playing because first-choice goalkeeper Vicario has been out injured and back-up Fraser Forster fell ill on the eve of the match.

arts.ttl: Premier League forced to release statement after Anthony Gordon goal in Newcastle vs Spurs
arts.sum: The Premier League Match Centre tweeted: "The referee’s call of goal was confirmed by VAR, who checked for a potential handball by Joelinton in the build-up and deemed that his arm was by his side, in a natural position and the contact was accidental." The Premier League have been forced into releasing a statement explaining why Anthony Gordon's Newcastle United equaliser was allowed to stand against Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: What the VAR said was the reason they allowed Newcastle's first goal to stand against Tottenham
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Spurs played out one of the most frenetic openings to a Premier League game you’re likely to ever see on Saturday. Indeed,...

arts.ttl: Spurs close in on £12.5m Czech goalkeeper Kinsky
arts.sum: Tottenham are set to add Slavia Prague goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky to Ange Postecoglou's squad amid an ongoing injury crisis.

arts.ttl: Premier League release statement as Tottenham left fuming over Newcastle decision
arts.sum: Tottenham opened the scoring in the early exchanges against Newcastle, but were quickly pegged back after Anthony Gordon's goal was allowed after major controversy in the build up

arts.ttl: Ange and Joe Hart share Celtic love in as Tottenham boss lets guard down live on air
arts.sum: Postecoglou was reunited with his former Hoops keeper before Spurs' clash with Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Tottenham to complete £12.5m goalkeeper transfer after Guglielmo Vicario 'shock'
arts.sum: Antonin Kinsky is joining Spurs from Slavia Prague in an initial £12.5million deal after a number of high-profile errors from backup stopper Fraser Forster and a nightmare run of results in the absence of No.1 Guglielmo Vicario
